sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Searches Medtric warranty policies using AI Search with hybrid semantic+keyword search against the Medtric Warranty Policies knowledge base. Use before making decisions. Extract 1-2 keywords from the claim reason.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"keyword","value":"","description":"Primary keyword extracted from the claim reason (e.g., 'physical damage', 'software', 'battery', 'screen', 'Gold', 'Silver')","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"crudInputs","value":{"operation":"lookup","table":{"value":"kb_knowledge","displayValue":"kb_knowledge"},"query":"kb_knowledge_base=589b035e1a034b679b491bc527987c75^workflow_state=published^short_descriptionLIKE{{keyword}}^ORtextLIKE{{keyword}}","returnFields":[{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"sys_id","label":"sys_id","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"sys_id","sublabel":"sys_id"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"number","label":"number","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"number","sublabel":"number"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"short_description","label":"short_description","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"short_description","sublabel":"short_description"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"text","label":"text","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"text","sublabel":"text"}],"limit":"5"},"description":"Lookup operation configuration","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Search Warranty Policy Knowledge Base
